summary: Iteration 13: DM Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All 22+ UI elements verified via Playwright. Complete DM inbox, thread view, message sending, context cards, profile Message button, and 'I have this' integration all working correctly.
passed_tests: NAV: Message icon (MessageCircle) present in navbar next to notification bell
NAV: DM badge button navigates to /messages on click
DM INBOX: /messages page loads with 'Messages' title
DM INBOX: Conversation list shows @username with avatar
DM INBOX: Conversation list shows last message preview
DM INBOX: Conversation list shows relative timestamp (e.g., '4 minutes ago')
DM INBOX: Unread badge shows count when messages are unread
DM THREAD: Clicking conversation opens thread view
DM THREAD: Back arrow button returns to inbox
DM THREAD: Thread header shows avatar and @username
DM THREAD: Username in header links to profile
DM THREAD: Context card shows ISO/trade reference (e.g., 're: your ISO for Mazzy Star — So Tonight That I Might See · I have this')
DM THREAD: Own messages display on right with honey background
DM THREAD: Other user's messages display on left with white background
DM THREAD: Messages show relative timestamps
DM THREAD: Message input field present and functional
DM THREAD: Send button present and works
DM THREAD: Sending message adds it to thread immediately
PROFILE: Message button visible on other users' profiles (next to Follow)
PROFILE: Message button navigates to /messages?to=userId
ISO: 'I have this' button visible on community ISO cards
ISO: 'I have this' button navigates to /messages with context params
BACKEND: POST /api/dm/conversations - creates conversation and sends initial message
BACKEND: GET /api/dm/conversations - lists user conversations with other_user info and unread_count
BACKEND: GET /api/dm/conversations/{id} - returns messages and context
BACKEND: POST /api/dm/conversations/{id}/messages - sends message
BACKEND: GET /api/dm/unread-count - returns unread message count
BACKEND: GET /api/dm/conversation-with/{userId} - checks existing conversation
BACKEND: GET /api/users/by-id/{userId} - returns user info
BACKEND: Cannot message yourself - returns 400
BACKEND: DM notification created when message sent
BACKEND: All DM endpoints require authentication
seed_data_creation: Created Pink Floyd ISO as trader user to test 'I have this' button visibility for demo user
context_for_next_testing_agent: DM feature fully implemented and tested. Endpoints: POST /api/dm/conversations (create conversation), GET /api/dm/conversations (list), GET /api/dm/conversations/{id} (get with messages), POST /api/dm/conversations/{id}/messages (send), GET /api/dm/unread-count, GET /api/dm/conversation-with/{userId}, GET /api/users/by-id/{userId}. Frontend: MessagesPage.js handles inbox and thread views. DMBadge component in Navbar.js polls every 15 seconds. Context cards show 're: your ISO for [record_name] · [action_text]' format. Messages auto-marked as read when opening thread. Profile Message button and 'I have this' button on ISO cards both navigate to /messages with appropriate params.

components: MessageCircle icon next to notification bell
Unread count badge when messages exist
Polls every 15 seconds for unread count
Back arrow to return to inbox
Polls for new messages every 5 seconds
Profile page: Message button next to Follow
ISO page: 'I have this' button on community ISO cards
Both navigate to /messages with appropriate params

endpoints: POST /api/dm/conversations - create and send initial message
security: User can only access own conversations
